product_stock_reservations.purpose: D-010/D-011 販售庫存保留 ledger
product_stock_reservations.deletePolicy: Referenced rows are retained; deactivate through the owning service.
product_stock_reservations.updatePolicy: Identifiers are immutable; business fields change only through the owning service.

columns.name: id
columns.type: BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY

columns.name: expires_at
columns.purpose: 線上付款到期時間；COD 可空

checks.name: ck_product_stock_reservations_expiry
checks.expression: expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > reserved_at

checks.name: ck_product_stock_reservations_terminal
checks.expression: (status='active' AND released_at IS NULL AND fulfilled_at IS NULL) OR (status IN ('released','expired') AND released_at IS NOT NULL AND fulfilled_at IS NULL) OR (status='fulfilled' AND fulfilled_at IS NOT NULL)

indexes.name: idx_product_stock_reservations_expiry
indexes.predicate: status='active' AND expires_at IS NOT NULL

validation: Online expires_at equals reserved_at + 30 minutes; COD expires_at is null; scheduler scans at least once per minute.
Allocation orders main before branches by code and may split an order item across rows.
Returns first move into an inspection location and never directly increment sellable stock.

checks.name: ck_bookings_money
